products.title: Migration

products.title: Print & Sew XL Irish Linen Planter Bucket
products.body_html:
Workshop: Printed Irish Linen XL Bucket Planter

Step into the print studio and explore the tactile beauty of Irish linen in this hands-on workshop focused on surface design and functional textiles. Participants will experiment with print techniques to create bold, expressive patterns on extra-large Irish linen fabric, transforming it into a sculptural bucket-style planter.

You’ll be guided through the process of designing, printing, and assembling your own XL fabric planter, learning how scale, texture, and pattern interact on heavyweight linen. The workshop also includes a short showcase session, where finished planters are styled and viewed as both practical objects and contemporary textile pieces.

What you’ll learn:

  • Printing techniques suitable for heavyweight Irish linen
  • Working at scale on fabric surfaces
  • Constructing and shaping an XL fabric bucket planter
  • Considering function, form, and display in textile design

What’s included:

  • XL Irish linen fabric
  • All printing materials and tools
  • Guidance from an experienced textile practitioner

Who it’s for:
Suitable for beginners and experienced makers alike—ideal for anyone interested in textile printing, sustainable materials, or creating statement pieces for interiors and gardens.

Participants leave with a finished XL linen bucket planter and a deeper understanding of printed textiles as functional art.

Come along, slow down, and enjoy a few creative hours making something both beautiful and useful in Portobello, Dublin 8.

products.title: Bloom Mystery Gift Box
products.body_html:
If you didn’t catch me at bloom, I have put together something really special – a limited-edition Bloom Gift Box filled with our much-loved hand printed Irish linen pieces, perfect for gifting (or keeping for yourself).

Inside the box you’ll find:

• A beautifully hand printed Irish linen Birch Ply Tray

ONE of the following Irish linen pieces:

  • A reusable Irish linen bread bag
  • Lavender Eye Pillow
  • A handy Irish linen Zipper Pouch
  • also included ⬇️

• French Soap

•Collection of Christmas diy treats 

*Irish Woodland Block Printing kit, included native Irish tree leaf wooden block, textile dye, cotton zipper pouch to print onto.

Altogether, this box is worth €80but for a short time it’s yours for €40

📦 Postage within Ireland: Free

 

Each piece is carefully made and printed by hand, celebrating Irish craft, natural materials, and everyday beauty. Quantities are limited, so once they’re gone, they’re gone.

Perfect as a thoughtful gift – or a well-deserved treat.

Orders Placed After December 6th cannot be guaranteed before Christmas.


Quilted Irish Linen Wallhanging

This is a pre order so please expect a 4 week turn around. I’ll send out orders as soon as I get through them so it may be a little faster.

products.title: Leaning In
products.body_html:
Leaning in when life is a bit scary and feels like we are on THE waltzers.

15cm x 15cm hand printed into Irish Linen using solvent free inks and hand carved blocks.

products.title: Hand Carved Printing Blocks
products.body_html:
These stamps are hand carved in India, using my original drawings.

Print on fabric, paper or impress into clay. 
Made from hard wood. They are durable and so versatile.

Native Irish Oak and Hawthorn Leaf motifs. Designed in my studio in Dublin and carved in India by a family run business. 

Textile dye not included, you can find Speedball textile inks in many art shops, including Evans Art Supplies’s in Dublin and Cork Art Supplies in Cork.

Each block measures 12 x 9 cm approximately.

products.title: Irish Linen Bread Storage Bag
products.body_html:
Our Bread Bags are perfect for storing your sourdough or other breads and baked treats. Irish Linen is an Eco-Friendly natural fabric, hard wearing, can be laundered numerous times and can last for years. Linen’s antibacterial properties enable the fabric to behave as an ideal storage bag for you freshly baked breads and cakes. 

 

I call them ‘Bread Bags’ because I love a good loaf, but really, they can be used to store anything, from your Veg to your Undies and Socks - linen this nice should be used as much as possible.

30cm x 40cm

*Please allow 10 days for orders to be dispatched.

products.title: Luxury Lavender Weighted Eye Pillow
products.body_html:
Let me tell you a little bit about why these eye pillows are so lovely.

Linen is a natural fibre that’s made from Flax. It’s soft to touch and because flax does not like chemicals (it weakens the crop) you can be assured it’s gentle on the delicate skin around the eyes. Coupled with the weight from the wheat grains and the soothing scent of the lavender, these eye pillows not only look beautiful but can help alleviate headaches and help you sleep better. 
100% Irish Linen Lavender Eye Pillow. Every element of these pillows are grown and made in Ireland. Hand printed and filled with Kilkenny grown wheat and Carlow grown Lavender, your tired eyes and mind will thank you for using one!

products.title: Gift Card
products.body_html: Give the gift of Liz Walsh Textiles to someone special. Maybe thats you! Who knows? A code will be sent to you after purchase. You can then redeem your card amount at the checkout. Choose from €25-€100.
